content.full_text:
Ken Finney  
Ted Prim

Section 84206 Terminating Committee

John Corzine of the Legislative Counsel asked whether a controlled committee of a retiring officeholder could file its semi-annual statement early. He indicated to me that the committee did not intend to engage in any political activity after it filed its statement.

Even though the committee is not covered by 18426, you and I decided to permit the committee to file early since the commission has ratified previous staff advice which permitted certain persons to file semi-annual statements early. We agreed that 18426 should be amended to include the control committee of the retiring officeholder.
